pattern.imageEvidence: florist arranging micro-wedding bouquet and small ceremony florals on a prep table

geometry.borderRole: outlined floral brief and support card borders
geometry.shadowRole: hero media only with flat consult surfaces

pattern.styleContract: Romantic editorial calm with bouquet prep proof, celadon page fields, cream support cards, blackberry ink, marigold accents reserved for consult actions, and a post-hero floral brief anchor strip as the signature move.

tagline: Small wedding flowers with a calm little plan.

hero.title: VowSprig micro-wedding florals hero image
hero.alt: A florist arranging a compact bridal bouquet and small wedding floral pieces on a bright prep table.

contact.serviceArea: Micro-wedding bouquets, personals, bud vases, ceremony markers, small installations, elopements, courthouse florals, and intimate receptions across the region

copy.heroTitle: Small wedding flowers with big-day feeling.
copy.heroText: VowSprig shapes bouquets, personals, bud vases, and small ceremony moments into a clear palette, setup plan, and floral scope that fits intimate celebrations.
copy.introTitle: Small guest count, full floral intention.
copy.introText: We start with date, venue, palette, personal flowers, setup access, and what should feel lush versus lightly styled.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to shape the floral brief?
copy.quoteText: Plan the consult with date, venue, colors, guest count, and floral must-haves. We will reply with availability and a right-sized floral path.

services.title: Personal Flowers
services.text: Bouquets, boutonnières, corsages, and small details for intimate wedding parties.

services.title: Ceremony Touches
services.text: Bud vases, aisle markers, signing table florals, and compact installation moments that travel well.

services.title: Reception Table Florals
services.text: Low arrangements, bud vases, and candle-safe floral plans for small dinners and private rooms.

process.title: Check the date
process.text: Venue, timing, color direction, and must-have pieces help us confirm fit quickly.

process.title: Shape the palette
process.text: We translate inspiration into seasonal stems, scale, and the pieces that matter most.

process.title: Prep and place
process.text: Florals arrive organized, labeled, and placed with a calm handoff for the day.

proof.label: palette adjusted to what looks best

notes: Works: marigold accents reserved for consult actions, and a post-hero floral brief anchor strip. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: florist arranging micro-wedding bouquet and small ceremony florals on a prep table. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Start floral consult is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Start floral consult, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: florist arranging micro-wedding bouquet and small ceremony florals on a prep table.
brandBrief.signatureMove: marigold accents reserved for consult actions, and a post-hero floral brief anchor strip.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic checklist-urgency recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Date first: availability checked before design drift.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share the event date, venue or address, guest count, setup window, power/water rules, and the package style you are considering.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Venue, timing, color direction, and must-have pieces help us confirm fit quickly.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Date-window flow for Micro-wedding bouquets, personals, bud vases, ceremony markers, small installations, elopements, courthouse florals, and intimate receptions across the region: date fit, setup rules, guest flow, and hold status come before package pressure.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For micro-wedding floral design, date fit, venue rules, palette direction, guest movement, and setup window are confirmed before the look gets locked.
